outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump calls Iran's response to peace plan 'unacceptable' as ceasefire is tested
outlets.summary: CNN covers Trump's blunt rejection of Iran's counter-proposal as 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE,' while Iran launched simultaneous drone attacks on Qatar, UAE, and Kuwait. Analysis focuses on collapsed diplomatic track and what comes next.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump calls Iran's response to peace plan 'unacceptable' as ceasefire is tested
outlets.summary: WaPo reports on the breakdown of Iran-US ceasefire talks after Iran's counter-proposal demanded Hormuz sovereignty, war reparations, and right to enrichment — all rejected by Trump. Netanyahu told 60 Minutes the war 'is not over.'

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump rejects Iran's ceasefire proposal, calling it 'totally unacceptable'
outlets.summary: NPR reports on Trump's Truth Social rejection of Iran's counter-proposal conveyed through Pakistani mediators. Iran demanded Hormuz sovereignty, reparations, and full sanctions relief — refusing nuclear disarmament. Oil surged 4.5% on news.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran on 'full readiness' to protect uranium at nuclear sites as Trump slams Tehran's new proposal
outlets.summary: Fox leads with IRGC threat — missiles 'locked onto American targets.' Frames Trump's 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE' rejection as strength. Netanyahu 60 Minutes interview featured prominently: 'War not over, uranium must be physically removed.'

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: 'Totally Unacceptable': Trump Rejects Iran Reply — 'They Will Be Laughing No Longer'
outlets.summary: Breitbart highlights Trump's aggressive rhetorical posture against Iran. Full Truth Social posts quoted. Frames Iran counter-proposal as diplomatic trap designed to humiliate the US while Iran buys time to rebuild.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran replies to US proposal to end war, Trump finds response 'unacceptable'
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera covers Iran's formal counter-proposal via Pakistani mediators: demanded Hormuz sovereignty, war reparations, sanctions lifted, end to Lebanon fighting, right to enrichment. Trump's rejection removes diplomatic off-ramp.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: Iran's Supreme Leader briefs military chief on 'new guiding measures' to confront adversaries
outlets.summary: Reuters/Fars report on Mojtaba Khamenei meeting Maj. Gen. Abdollahi and issuing new military directives — contradicting US Ambassador Waltz's claim that Khamenei is 'severely injured and in hiding.'

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Iran-US peace talks stall after Tehran demands war reparations and Hormuz sovereignty
outlets.summary: BBC reports ceasefire talks collapsed after Iran's counter-proposal rejected core US demand for nuclear enrichment moratorium. Oil surged 4.5%. Netanyahu on 60 Minutes: war 'not over' until uranium physically removed from Iran.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Netanyahu: Iran war not over, no clear end to fighting with Hezbollah
outlets.summary: Haaretz covers Netanyahu's CBS 60 Minutes bombshell: war 'not over,' uranium must be physically removed, Israel will phase out US military aid over 10 years. Critical analysis of Israel's Lebanon strategy as IDF kills 36 on May 10.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Tehran says it rejected US proposal as 'surrender,' demanded reparations, control of Hormuz
outlets.summary: ToI liveblog: Iran's counter-proposal details leaked — demanded war reparations, full Hormuz sovereignty, sanctions relief, Lebanon ceasefire. Trump: 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE.' IDF kills 36 across Lebanon — deadliest since ceasefire.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Iran drones strike Qatar cargo ship; UAE and Kuwait intercept attacks in broadest Gulf escalation since ceasefire
outlets.summary: JPost covers simultaneous Iranian drone attacks on Qatar, UAE, Kuwait — broadest single-day geographic spread since April 8 ceasefire. IRGC warns missiles 'locked onto American targets.' Oil surges on escalation fears.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian vows talks with US 'not surrender' but defense of national interests
outlets.summary: Press TV covers Pezeshkian's statement: 'We will never bow our heads before the enemy — dialogue is not surrender or retreat.' Iran submitted 10-point counter-proposal via Pakistan. Framed as position of strength, not capitulation.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Top general tells Ayatollah Khamenei: Armed Forces ready to crush any aggression
outlets.summary: Press TV reports Mojtaba Khamenei met Maj. Gen. Abdollahi and issued new military directives. Designed to counter US Ambassador Waltz's claim that Khamenei is 'severely injured and in hiding.' Shows Supreme Leader as active and in command.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Iran's response to US shows Tehran's commitment to peace through strength and mutual respect
outlets.summary: IRNA (official Iranian news) frames the 10-point counter-proposal as Iran seeking peace 'through strength and mutual respect' — not surrender. Frames Trump's rejection as evidence of US bad faith and irrational demands.
